source: INTRO MODULE_ The Basics of Nodes and Node Dojo_2MAY2024.blend

driver.note: The supplied Blender file displays its cached frame-1 Geometry Nodes result on open even though the scene timeline is saved at frame 1405. The gallery preserves that visible on-open reference state.

validation: Exact topology and matching Node Dojo emblem composition, with maximum local-bounds difference 0.00007450580596923828 units. Blender's Invert Arc keeps the start point and uses the opposite signed sweep; reproducing that contract restores the yin-yang's inner S curve instead of its former mirror. The complete raw point clouds are then within 0.00007920952720588948 units symmetrically, with a mean nearest-point distance of 0.0000005521627707045178. Set Curve Tilt and Sample Curve reproduce the arced title, while extracted pixel-font contours, explicit line-break instances, half-em character spacing, and shared-corner Fill Curve welding reproduce the WELCOME/to the lettering.
